Package
Description
org.episteme.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.

    static Map<String,double[]>
    StructuralLoadPath.calculateReactions(List<StructuralLoadPath.StructuralMember> members, List<StructuralLoadPath.AppliedLoad> loads, List<String> supportIds)
    Calculates reactions at support points for a set of applied loads using equilibrium.
    static Map<String,Real>
    StructuralLoadPath.slabLoadDistribution(double slabLoad, double slabLength, double slabWidth, List<StructuralLoadPath.StructuralMember> beams)
    Distributes a surface load from a slab to supporting beams using tributary area principles.
